message:
fix(messages): Use output.eprint() for styled stderr output

The render_styled_stderr function was using raw eprintln! with markup
tags like [color]text[/], which would print the tags literally instead
of rendering styled output. Changed to use output.eprint() which
properly routes through rich_rust Console for styled stderr.

Also fixed clippy warnings:
- Added #[allow(clippy::option_if_let_else)] for header construction
- Inlined format args in render_styled
- Added #[allow(clippy::missing_panics_doc)] for static templates
- Added #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] for ETA calculation
- Made IndexingProgress::is_visible() const

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
